profile.name: Jane
profile.title: Alabaster Corpse Jane
profile.story: She was once the princess of the fallen Dukedom of Gray. The Dukedom of Gray, wiped off the map by the Demon invaders during the Demon War, was the protector of countless secrets, including the ruins and technologies of an ancient civilization. Jane, too, lost her life to protect those secrets. Later, she was brought back to the world as an undead by Malduk, a high-ranking officer and a strategist of the Demon Army. She was given a new consciousness by a strange, dark magic. Now, she seeks to go on a journey to find her past self and her lost memories.

1.name: Funeral Rites
1.description:
Deals [ffc800]361*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+277.6% of Attack Power[-] damage to enemies within range and [fa96fa]stuns[-] them for [64ffff]2sec[-].

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

2.name: Mark of Death
2.description:
Engraves [fa96fa][Mark of Death][-] on all enemies for [64ffff]15 sec[-], dealing [ffc800]9*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 6.9% ATK[-] M.DMG every [64ffff]1 sec[-] and reducing M.DEF by [ff6464]10%[-]. If recast within [64ffff]15 sec[-], the M.DEF reduction increases by [64ff64]50%[-] and stacks up to [64ffff]5 times[-]. The M.DEF reduction increase effect cannot be dispelled.

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

3.name: Day of Ruin
3.description:
Deals [ffc800]106*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 81.4% ATK[-] M.DMG every [64ffff]1 sec[-] to all enemies for [64ffff]22 sec[-], and recovers HP equal to [ffc800]50%[-] of damage dealt. During the duration, reduces M.DMG taken by [64ff64]11%[-] for [64ffff]4 allies[-] with the lowest M.DEF, and deals additional [ffc800]81.4% ATK[-] M.DMG to enemies inflicted with [fa96fa][Mark of Death][-].

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

4.name: Rest in Peace
4.description:
Increases M.DEF of the ally with the lowest M.DEF by [64ff64]101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))[-]. When taking fatal damage, enters [fa96fa][Coffin][-] state for [64ffff]5 sec[-], restoring [64ff64]197*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 153.7% ATK + 10% Max HP[-].

[fa96fa][Coffin]:[-] Unaffected by ATK Spd changes, becomes [fa96fa]immune[-] to all damage, and deals M.DMG equal to [ffc800]5%[-] of Max HP to nearby enemies every [64ffff]1 sec[-].

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

light.effect: Recovers HP equal to 50% of damage dealt.

dark.effect: Mana cost increases by 2000, but pulls the target toward you.

light.effect: Debuff duration is reduced to 10 sec, but damage is increased by 500%.

dark.effect: [Mark of Death] cannot be removed by cleansing harmful effects.
All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG.

light.effect: When the effect triggers, removes all harmful effects from all allies.

dark.effect: When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for 1 sec.
On hit, Attack and Healing increase by 1%. This effect stacks up to 35 times.

uw.name: Unchanging Mind, Erekura
uw.description: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK every sec to nearby enemies, reduces their ATK by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
uw.story: When Malduk's magic resurrected Jane as an undead, she should not have felt anything. Yet, she felt warm and comfortable as mysterious energy surrounded her dead body. She should not have been able to even feel it. But when Malduk took her, she instinctively reached out to the warm presence. Later, when a mysterious magic brought her back to consciousness, the first thing she did was to inspect her coffin, which radiated with tragic yet warm love. Inside, she found the following message carefully engraved: 'My unchanging love for you.'

1.name: Funeral Doll
1.description: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target's CC Resist by 320 and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.
1.story:
A doll used in funeral ceremonies in the Dukedom of Gray.
 It is normally made to look like the deceased and put in front of the tombstone. After the Dukedom fell and Jane died, people put this doll beside her body.

2.name: Death-imbued Cushion
2.description: [Mark of Death] When a marked enemy dies, increases own ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec. Stacks up to 16 times.
2.story:
The cushion that Jane hugs to sleep inside the coffin. It's imbued with the spirits that fell asleep with her inside the coffin. 
They constantly give the hollowness of death to Jane.

3.name: Flowers of a Forgotten Dukedom
3.description: [Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's M.DEF by 3% for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
3.story: A flower of the Dukedom that can no longer be found. It is also known as the Flower of Boundaries that connects life and death, and it gets its nourishment from destruction. A painfully beautiful flower. If you gift it to someone, you will be able to share that person's last moment in a dream.

4.name: First Friend Doll
4.description: [Rest in Peace] Sets cooldown to 45 sec, and after activation, reduces M.DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec.
4.story:
A doll that looks just like Rephy, Jane's first friend.
Jane froze in front of a shop selling poison.
Seeing Jane's eyes locked on the limited edition of Rephy Doll on the shop display, Epis decided to buy her the doll.
Since the doll could only be purchased with mileage, Epis was almost crying after spending all her pocket money. However, Jane's smile after getting this doll as her first friend was probably worth it.

sw.requirement: Charges up every sec and every time self deals DMG. This Skill can be cast upon gaining [64ff64]80[-] charges.
sw.description: Summons the soul of Unchanging Mind, Erekura for [64ffff]10sec[-], increasing own Heal Rate by [64ff64]27%[-]. Every [64ffff]0sec[-], reduces M.DEF of all enemies by [ff6464]3%[-] for [64ffff]5sec[-]. This effect stacks up to [64ffff]5[-] times. After [64ffff]10sec[-], consumes stacks on the target to deal [ffc800]160% of ATK[-] M.DMG per stack.

advancement.2: Changes M.DEF reduction per stack to 20%.

sw.story:
The unwavering love of the one who yearns for his dearest and endearing Jane, and the ardent wish of Jane to meet that person became the very seed that was planted in Erekura. Whenever Jane recovered her lost emotion, the seed entwined deeper with Jane and took the form of a thorny vine that protects her.
The soul of Erekura which started sprouting and extending its reach bloomed every time her emotions became stronger and deeper, as if it was resonating with Jane.
When Jane finally reunited with the one whom she yearned for so dearly, the slumbering flower buds resonated with her overjoyed heart and fully blossomed into flowers. Wherever the pollen from these bloomed flowers touch, the place becomes covered in flowers of the fallen dukedom, leaving scarlet hills behind.
